Crafting
Elegant Living Spaces

Premium modern furniture designed and manufactured in Cairo. From master bedrooms to dining rooms — every piece is tailored to your space and lifestyle.

Explore Collections Visit Showroom
15+
Years of Craft
Our Story

Furniture, Crafted in Cairo

“Every piece begins as a conversation about how you live.”

Lora Furniture is a Nasr City showroom and workshop creating modern, made-to-measure furniture for homes across Cairo. For over fifteen years we have paired clean contemporary design with solid, hand-finished construction.

From master bedrooms and living rooms to dining sets, dressing rooms and media units, each collection is built to order — your choice of finish, fabric and dimensions.

  • Custom sizes, fabrics & finishes
  • Solid, hand-finished construction
  • Delivery & assembly across Cairo
  • 15+ years of craftsmanship

Master Bedrooms

Master Bedrooms
Scallop Velvet Bedroom Set

Scallop-edged headboard in warm taupe velvet, paired with a walnut wardrobe with smoked glass panels.

Master Bedrooms
Cloud Bouclé — New Arrival

Cloud-form bouclé headboard with LED wood slat walls, floating nightstands and a matching tufted bench.

Master Bedrooms
Luxury Bouclé Detail

Plush cylinder legs, LED under-bed glow, walnut nightstand with brass ginkgo — craftsmanship in every detail.

Kids Bedrooms

Kids Room
Adventure Twin Beds

Twin beds with built-in storage. Perfect for siblings or growing kids.

Kids Room
Pastel Princess Room

Softly elegant girls' room in pastels — refined enough to last.

Living Rooms

Living Rooms
Cloud Bouclé Sofa

A plush bouclé sofa in soft ivory — deep seats and clean lines for a calm, modern living room.

Living Rooms
Curved Corner Lounge

A practical curved corner unit in textured beige, styled with warm terracotta and mustard accents.

Living Rooms
Pebble Accent Chair

A rounded accent chair in rich terracotta bouclé — a cozy statement piece for any corner.

Dining Rooms

Dining Rooms
Ivory Tufted Dining Set

A glossy ivory table framed by six button-tufted chairs — refined dining beneath a crystal chandelier.

Dining Rooms
Oak Provincial Dining Set

A solid oak table with soft grey upholstered chairs and a matching display cabinet — warm modern style.

Dressing Rooms

Dressing Rooms
Mirrored Blush Wardrobe

A floor-to-ceiling wardrobe in soft blush with a smoked-mirror module and fluted drawer fronts.

Dressing Rooms
Four-Door Mirror Wardrobe

A roomy four-door wardrobe in crisp white with a full-length mirror and two soft-close drawers.

Dressing Rooms
Walk-In Closet System

A fully fitted walk-in system — hanging rails, drawers and dedicated shoe shelving, all custom-built.

Walnut Media Wall
